---
bibliography: refs.bib
citeproc: false
nocite: "@*"
format:
  html:
    code-tools: true
  typst:
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      x: 1.5cm
      y: 2.0cm
    section-numbering: 1.1.a
    mainfont: "DejaVu Serif"
    fontsize: 11pt
---


```{=typst}
#import "model.typ": project_template

#show: body => project_template(
  title: [Créer un rapport de projet\ avec Quarto et Typst],
  team: [Équipe 8],
  authors: ([Jean-Guy Badiane], [Serena Williams], [François Pignon], [Anne Hathaway]),
  tutor: [Philippe Lucas],
  project: [Projet Statistique de 1ère année - Année 2025-2026],
  body
)
```

## Introduction {.unnumbered}

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Section 1

### Subsection 1.1

### Subsection 1.2

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Section 2

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Bibliography


{{< pagebreak >}}

## Conclusion {.unnumbered}


{{< pagebreak >}}

## Annexes {.unnumbered}


{{< pagebreak >}}
